creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
I want to using poedit to translate FreeBSD handbook in Chinese. So I need .po file.

Github : https://github.com/ykla/freebsd-doc-cn

I fork it from:
https://github.com/yzgyyang/freebsd-doc-cn  

and the .po file locate  at:
https://github.com/yzgyyang/freebsd-doc-cn/tree/master/books/handbook 
 

Thanks a  lot.
